abstract.text: A Swift 6.2 wrapper around the TMDB API. Engineered for simplicity.

inlineContent.text: API using async/await and typed throws. All endpoints return mock data automatically in unit tests and SwiftUI previews via
Supports movies, TV series, seasons, episodes, search, discover, trending, authentication, account management, lists, guest sessions, and more. See
